case_title: JACQUELINE VASQUEZ VS. RAUL AMILCAR VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL AMILCAR DBA. BROTHERS AUTO BODY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL AMILCAR DBA. BROTHERS AUTO BODY SHOP $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,575.00, PRIOR TO OR CONCURRENTLY WITH THE PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL TRANSFER TITLE TO THE VEHICLE, A 2004 CHEVROLET LICENSE NUMBER 6XPL235, TO THE DEFENDANT. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Jan. 8, 2015 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff, Jacqueline Vasquez.
Robert Garcia, Esq., Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant, Raul Amilcar Vasquez who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Raul M. Vasquez is sworn. Counsel testifies on appellant/defendant behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhbits not marked - check receipts
- 7 pages of Lien sale for vehicle
- road service receipt

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Judgment Entered
